zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏弱
zh.content:
目前AVAX/USD价格在8.70附近徘徊，较SMA(20) 8.9772明显偏低，显示短期均线承压，价格处于弱势整理阶段。MACD为-0.1602且信号线缺失，暗示下行动能占优，但幅度有限，市场仍存在横盘调整可能。  

支撑位初步关注8.65附近，若跌破此区域，可能进一步测试8.50心理关口。阻力位则在9.00附近，价格若企稳并突破该水平，短线多头信号才可能确认。价格波动较小，趋势不明朗，市场参与者应保持谨慎。  

从交易策略来看，短线可关注低位逢低试探支撑，但需严格设置止损以控制风险。中长线投资者则可等待价格回到均线附近并出现MACD底背离或明显反转信号后再介入，避免在震荡中频繁操作。  

综合来看，AVAX/USD短期偏弱震荡，短线操作宜轻仓，关注关键支撑和阻力位突破，等待明确信号后再加大仓位。趋势尚未完全明朗，需结合市场情绪和成交量变化判断后续方向。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Avalanche (AVAX) is currently in a consolidation phase, hovering near the $8.70 level. The price action has shown minimal movement over the last 24 hours, with a 0.10% change, indicating that market participants are in a wait-and-see mode. The high and low of the day at $8.7072 and $8.6976 suggest tight range-bound trading. With no clear direction in the short term, AVAX is in a neutral position, though it is crucial to observe any upcoming breakout or breakdown for signs of a potential trend.

The absence of an RSI value leaves room for uncertainty in terms of overbought or oversold conditions. Meanwhile, the MACD indicator shows a negative reading at -0.16025337, which suggests a bearish momentum, although the absence of a signal line makes it difficult to gauge its strength. A more comprehensive assessment can be made once the signal line is available, potentially confirming whether the downtrend is gaining momentum or if a reversal is underway.

The 20-period simple moving average (SMA) is currently at $8.97720, acting as a key resistance level for the asset. This indicates that AVAX is trading below its short-term average price, reflecting a bearish bias in the market. If the price fails to break above the SMA, it could continue to face selling pressure. On the downside, the $8.70 level holds as a support zone, and a break below this could lead to further declines, potentially targeting $8.50 or lower.

Traders should watch for a decisive break above the SMA or a breach of the $8.70 support to gauge the next directional move. A rally above $9 could confirm a bullish reversal, while a sustained decline under $8.70 may open the door for further bearish action. Keep an eye on the volume and any changes in momentum to better time entry points and manage risk accordingly.
